recommendations.title: Hell House LLC
recommendations.overview: Five years after an unexplained malfunction causes the death of 15 tour-goers and staff on the opening night of a Halloween haunted house tour, a documentary crew travels back to the scene of the tragedy to find out what really happened.

recommendations.title: The Night
recommendations.overview: An Iranian couple living in the US become trapped inside a hotel when insidious events force them to face the secrets that have come between them, in a night that never ends.

recommendations.title: Hotel Rwanda

recommendations.title: The Cove
recommendations.overview: The Cove tells the amazing true story of how an elite team of individuals, films makers and free divers embarked on a covert mission to penetrate the hidden cove in Japan, shining light on a dark and deadly secret. The shocking discoveries were only

recommendations.title: Summer of 84
recommendations.overview: After suspecting that their police officer neighbor is a serial killer, a group of teenage friends spend their summer spying on him and gathering evidence, but as they get closer to discovering the truth, things get dangerous.
recommendations.director: Yoann-Karl Whissell, François Simard, Anouk Whissell

recommendations.title: Raid
recommendations.overview: After receiving an anonymous tip, a tax officer leads a raid on the mansion of the most powerful figure in Lucknow, a member of parliament who has been evading income tax for years.

recommendations.title: The Consequences of Love

recommendations.title: Tower of Terror
recommendations.overview: A disgraced reporter investigates an abandoned luxury hotel where five people mysteriously disappeared sixty years earlier.
